docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOANE-MALLOTTE, JOSHUA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINCAID, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOANE-MALLOTTE, JOSHUA $3,435.79 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,485.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KEVIN KINCAID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSHUA DOANE-MALLOTTE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
